write_blocker: AGENCY_AUTONOMY_API_KEY missing in OpenClaw runtime; local planner refused connection; production planner returned 403 Forbidden. No raw Supabase agency write performed.

candidate.why_sellable: Premium chef-owned seasonal American restaurant with reservation, private-event, gift-card, and order channels already present; current website visibly under-sells the dining experience and has weak mobile/CTA hierarchy.

known_public_facts.hours_from_current_site: Tuesday-Thursday 4:30 pm-9 pm; Friday-Saturday 4:30 pm-10 pm; Sunday 4:30 pm-9 pm; Monday closed
known_public_facts.chef_owner_story: Dave Perlick's highly lauded flagship restaurant in Barrington with regionally and seasonally inspired flavors

review_signals_from_existing_research.google: 4.8 / 698 reviews recorded in local browser research on 2026-05-06
review_signals_from_existing_research.opentable: 3,010 reviews surfaced by web search on 2026-05-07

current_site_gaps: Hero leads with carryout limitations instead of dining/reservation/private-event story.
Reservation path is visually secondary and phone-call-led.
Private event path is only an email handoff, not a conversion funnel.
Gift-card and online-order CTAs compete without hierarchy.
Large blank bands and dated visual treatment reduce premium feel.
Mobile first screen is text-heavy and lacks sticky high-intent CTAs.
Browser accessibility snapshot exposed mismatched logo alt text mentioning veggii kitchen and bar.

required_next_mc_action: Replay this payload through the protected Mission Control agency website-workflow provisioning route, then create the canonical root/child tasks before build work starts.
